name: Medium Stackable Storage Bin - Brightroom™: Black Polypropylene Utility, 9.25 Volume, 22.79x15.98x8.39, Universal Storage
description:
Declutter your space in style with this Medium Stackable Storage Bin from Brightroom™. The plastic bin has a rectangular silhouette in solid black for an elegant look that matches any decor aesthetic. It features an open-top design for convenient sorting and storing, along with two cutout handles on the sides for easy portability. Best of all, the stackable design allows for space-saving storage when the bin isn't in use.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
